summary: Backend-only testing for XMRMine Pro (FastAPI + Mongo). Created pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py with 14 tests covering health, /api/contact (success + validation), and /api/purchases (success across chains 1/137/56, USDT/NATIVE, validation on address & tx_hash length, listing, and buyer_address lowercase filter). All 14 tests passed against the public URL (https://task-runner-90.preview.emergentagent.com/api).

minor.issue: logger is referenced inside handlers (lines 96, 143) but defined AFTER app.include_router() at line 174. Works in practice because handlers are invoked lazily at request time, but this is fragile ordering — move logger setup above the first usage.

buyer_address and tx_hash are only length-validated (min/max 42 and 66). No regex check for '0x' prefix or hex characters — any 42/66-char string is accepted. Consider Field(pattern=r'^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{40}$') and r'^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$'.
token_type is a plain str — accepts any value (e.g. 'FOO' returns 200). Should be a Literal['USDT','NATIVE'] or validated enum.
chain is int with no whitelist — arbitrary integers accepted. Should be Literal[1,56,137] to match supported chains.
amount is a free-form str — no numeric validation. A simple Decimal/regex check would prevent bad data.
No duplicate-tx_hash protection; same tx_hash can be POSTed multiple times and creates multiple purchase rows. Consider a unique index on tx_hash.
Uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') — should migrate to lifespan context manager.

action_items: Optional: reorder logger definition to before route handlers in /app/backend/server.py.
Optional: tighten Pydantic validation on /api/purchases (regex on address/tx_hash, Literal for chain and token_type, numeric amount).
Optional: add unique index on purchases.tx_hash to prevent duplicates.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger used before defined in source order (works via lazy request handling, but brittle).
server.py: PurchaseCreate validation is length-only; malformed hex or wrong chain IDs slip through.
server.py: token_type accepts arbitrary strings — missing Literal/enum.
server.py: deprecated on_event shutdown handler should be replaced by lifespan.
seed_data_creation: Tests insert TEST_ prefixed contact_messages and purchases rows (not cleaned up). A small number of records persist in the 'contact_messages' and 'purchases' collections in test_database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints /api/, /api/contact (POST+GET), /api/purchases (POST+GET with optional buyer_address filter) all verified via pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Re-run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://task-runner-90.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend was NOT tested per explicit instruction (requires real MetaMask).
